headline: Vanyar Launch Tests Depth Of Palantir Foundry And AIP Demand
summary: Vanyar, a specialist consultancy focused on Palantir Foundry and AIP, has launched to support enterprise AI adoption outside Palantir’s largest accounts. The firm is targeting clients across APAC and the Middle East that are looking to operationalise AI on Palantir’s platforms. This development reflects growing third party interest in Palantir’s software beyond direct contracts with NasdaqGS:PLTR. For readers tracking NasdaqGS:PLTR, Vanyar’s launch adds a new layer to the story around...
